title: Set up FTS5 search end to end
description: Create the FTS5 table, keep it synced with triggers, and query with MATCH and bm25 ranking.
body: Steps: 1. Create an FTS5 virtual table (or external-content table referencing the base) over the columns to search and choose a tokenizer. 2. Add AFTER INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE triggers (or use the contentless/external-content sync commands) so the index tracks the base table. 3. Backfill existing rows into the index. 4. Query with WHERE fts MATCH ? ORDER BY bm25(fts) for ranked results. 5. Periodically run an 'optimize' insert to merge the index. Rollback point: drop the FTS table and triggers; the base table is unchanged. Validation: insert/update/delete on the base reflects in search results, and MATCH queries are fast and ranked.
